patterns.label: Meeting Notes & Action Item Capture
patterns.llmRationale: Projected to C50 from C31 baseline (+226 occ over 19 cycles at v=11.9/cycle). 565 total, 78.4 hrs across 50 unbroken cycles. STABLE — Loop-meeting-notes chain head shows no signs of decay. C50 signals empty; trend held via momentum.

patterns.label: Azure DevOps Notification Triage
patterns.llmRationale: Projected to C50 from C31 baseline (+573 occ at v=30.1/cycle). 1436 total — MEGA SATURATION. Decomposition into 5 workstream sub-classifiers remains the recommended next action. Highest automation score (95) unchanged.

patterns.label: Agent Eval Setup, Analysis & Standardized Reporting
patterns.llmRationale: Rising trend sustained through C50. 712 occ projected from C31 (+281 at v=14.8/cycle). Highest value score (95). Eval strategy surging driven by Golden Evals and actionability analysis threads. BSI-adjacent.

patterns.label: Eval Design Scoping & Expert Coaching
patterns.llmRationale: BSI 87 CRITICAL persists. Rising through C50. 380 occ projected from C31 (+169 at v=8.9/cycle). Single expert PM remains sole DRI. Codification unblocks highest-severity bottleneck in catalog.

patterns.label: Weekly Project Status Report Generation
patterns.llmRationale: Rising through C50. 299 occ projected from C31 (+152 at v=8/cycle). 5-format parallel creation gap persists. Rising signal from Loop, Teams, email multi-source synthesis demand.

patterns.label: Eval Framework Template & Coverage Scaffolding
patterns.llmRationale: Stable through C50. 421 occ projected from C31 (+173 at v=9.1/cycle). Consistent demand for coverage scaffolding and intent-slot matrix generation. Template entropy low.

patterns.label: Calendar Overload & Meeting Invite Triage
patterns.llmRationale: Stable and highest absolute time-cost pattern. 529.8 hrs is the catalog's largest time sink. 693 occ projected from C31 (+302 at v=15.9/cycle). Meeting overload shows no sign of abating.

patterns.label: Meeting Transcript to Loop/PPT Pipeline
patterns.llmRationale: Rising through C50. 284 occ projected from C31 (+137 at v=7.2/cycle). Child pattern of meeting-notes chain head. Transcript-to-artifact pipeline demand growing with Camp AIR and CAPE format proliferation.

patterns.label: External Post-Meeting Recap & Escalation
patterns.llmRationale: Rising through C50. 249 occ projected from C31 (+120 at v=6.3/cycle). External partner cadences growing. Escalation paths now include 3 distinct customer tier tracks.

patterns.label: Partner & Customer Eval Enablement Pack
patterns.llmRationale: Rising through C50. 248 occ projected from C31 (+110 at v=5.8/cycle). Partner enablement pack demand highest among composite multi-source patterns. Three distinct customer tier tracks identified.

patterns.label: Team Status Parallel Creation Gap
patterns.llmRationale: Stable through C50. 207 occ projected from C31 (+97 at v=5.1/cycle). 5-format parallel creation gap unchanged. High automation and value parity (87/87) — well-suited for unified template skill.

patterns.label: Cross-Tool Context Fragmentation
patterns.llmRationale: Stable through C50. 193 occ projected from C31 (+93 at v=4.9/cycle). Context switching cost remains highest per-participant in catalog. 6 participants touched — widest reach pattern.

patterns.label: Training/Hackathon Event Coordination
patterns.llmRationale: Rising through C50. 173 occ projected from C31 (+80 at v=4.2/cycle). Highest participant count (8). Time sink second only to calendar triage. Event frequency accelerating in H1 2026.

patterns.label: Recurring Meeting Agenda Preparation
patterns.llmRationale: Stable through C50. 224 occ projected from C31 (+105 at v=5.5/cycle). Recurring cadence patterns showing no drift. Agenda template standardization would reduce prep time by ~40%.

patterns.label: VoC Customer Ask Dedup & Routing
patterns.llmRationale: Stable through C50. 147 occ projected from C31 (+68 at v=3.6/cycle). Customer ask deduplication surface area growing with partner tier expansion.

patterns.label: Copilot Platform Architecture Q&A
patterns.llmRationale: Stable through C50. 166 occ projected from C31 (+76 at v=4.0/cycle). Platform architecture Q&A demand correlates with new partner onboarding velocity.

patterns.label: Broadcast Email Classification
patterns.llmRationale: Stable through C50. 198 occ projected from C31 (+95 at v=4.9/cycle). Low value score (43) — purely mechanical. High automation score (92) makes it viable as a utility sub-skill within a broader email-triage pipeline.

patterns.label: Access Governance Alert Triage
patterns.llmRationale: Stable through C50. 112 occ projected from C31 (+53 at v=2.8/cycle). Access alert volume tracks security audit cycles. Mid-value utility — better as sub-skill within IT-ops pipeline.

patterns.label: Action Items Fragmented Across Systems
patterns.llmRationale: Stable through C50. 138 occ projected from C31 (+65 at v=3.4/cycle). ADO + Loop + Teams tri-source fragmentation persists. No consolidation tooling adopted yet — prime candidate for lightweight aggregation skill.

patterns.label: Redundant Deck Creation & Content Reuse Gap
patterns.llmRationale: DECLINING — velocity dropped from 3.4 to 2.2. 127 occ projected from C31 (+76 at declining v). Deck reuse tooling adoption partially reducing duplicate creation. Monitor for 2 more cycles before archival consideration.

patterns.label: Self-Authored Tool & Prototype Building
patterns.llmRationale: DECLINING — velocity fell to 1.8 from prior 2.9. 108 occ projected from C31 (+57 at declining v). Skill library adoption partially displacing manual prototype creation. May graduate to archived if trend holds two more cycles.

patterns.label: Customer Enablement Asset Standardization
patterns.llmRationale: Rising through C50. 89 occ projected from C31 (+64 at rising v=2.8/cycle). Customer-tier differentiation driving new standardization demand. Merging with partner-eval-enablement pattern being evaluated.

patterns.label: AI Skill Library Socialization & Adoption
patterns.llmRationale: Rising through C50. 76 occ projected from C31 (+44 at v=2.5/cycle). Meta-pattern: as skill catalog grows, socialization effort grows proportionally. Self-referential to Skilluminator mission.

patterns.label: Customer Signal to Guidance Pipeline
patterns.llmRationale: Rising through C50. 68 occ projected from C31 (+53 at v=2.3/cycle). Pain-point-to-playbook pipeline formalizing across 4 sources. Cross-source validation confirmed — candidate for Named Pipeline promotion.

candidateSkills.name: meeting-notes-action-extractor
candidateSkills.description: Ingests meeting transcript, agenda, or Loop doc and emits structured action items with owner/due-date, decisions log, follow-up email draft, and ADO task stubs. 565 occ across 50 unbroken cycles — most durable pattern in catalog.
triggerExamples: Extract action items from this standup transcript
Summarize customer meeting into Loop page with owners
Create standardized 1:1 notes template
Generate post-meeting recap from architecture call
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Replaces ~78 hrs across 4 roles. Chain head for 2 downstream patterns. Est. ~$203K/yr.

candidateSkills.name: eval-report-synthesizer
candidateSkills.description: Ingests eval results, strategy discussions, and actionability brainstorms. RISING — 712 occ at C50. Highest value score (95) in catalog. Covers Golden Evals, CAPE synthesis, and actionability analysis pipelines.
triggerExamples: Synthesize eval progress from CAPE threads
Generate actionability analysis from working session notes
Prepare Golden Evals kickoff report
Create eval strategy overview from Teams discussion
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Saves ~147 hrs across 5 roles. Strongest rising signal. Est. ~$383K/yr.

candidateSkills.name: eval-design-advisor
candidateSkills.description: Codifies Eval SME PM expert knowledge. BSI 87 CRITICAL — single point of failure for 50 cycles. RISING with 380 occ. Unblocks the most critical bottleneck in the catalog.
triggerExamples: How many evals needed for a 3-intent agent?
Keyword match vs semantic grading — which to use?
Guide actionability assessment setup
What is the Golden Eval methodology?
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Unblocks BSI 87 CRITICAL bottleneck. 380 occ RISING. Est. ~$225K/yr.

candidateSkills.name: calendar-triage-advisor
candidateSkills.description: Analyzes calendar load, meeting invite queue, and recurrence patterns. Highest absolute time cost in catalog at 529.8 hrs. 693 occ across 7 participants — widest time-sink pattern.
triggerExamples: Which meetings can I decline this week?
Consolidate my recurring 1:1s into a single prep block
Flag meetings with no agenda or clear owner
Suggest optimal focus-time blocks given my calendar
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Addresses 529+ hrs of meeting overhead. Widest participant reach. Est. ~$1.37M/yr potential.

candidateSkills.name: weekly-status-report-generator
candidateSkills.description: Generates standardized weekly status from Loop, Teams, email, and meetings. Resolves 5-format parallel creation gap. RISING with 299 occ at C50.
triggerExamples: Generate CAPE eval weekly status from Loop and Teams
Draft XFN report-out from this week's meetings
Create EOD debrief template from today's activity
Refresh weekly status across all project sources
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Saves ~66 hrs across 4 roles. Eliminates format proliferation. Est. ~$171K/yr.
